projectDescription: A lightweight Go library providing a simple, channel-based semaphore for controlling goroutine concurrency.
keyFeatures: Channel-based semaphore using Go's built-in concurrency primitives
Simple Acquire/Release API to control concurrent goroutine slots
Introspection via Len() and IsEmpty() to observe semaphore state
Safe handling of edge-case concurrency values (0, -1, etc.)
Zero external dependencies — only the Go standard library
Interface-driven design enabling easy mocking and testing
